content: I want a refund, my meal wasn't as I wished!

Responding:

My regards,
Caleb
Have you sent the last week reports?
Stay for overtime afternoon, don't forget
Where have you been Wednesday afternoon?
Responding: I have refunded your money. Anything else?

Hello, James
